scripts.start: npm run pull && npm run data && concurrently "npm run hugo" "npm run studio"
scripts.nuke-studio: rm -rf studio/node_modules studio/package-lock.json && npm install --prefix studio --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run data && cd frontend && hugo --minify
scripts.deploy: npm run build && git add . && git commit -m 'Rent bygg og deploy' && git push origin main
